Our Canadian immigration journey has finally reached a beautiful milestone — we received our Confirmation of Permanent Residence (COPR) letters just a few days ago, and I couldn’t be more thankful to Xiphias Immigration for being our guide and support throughout this long and sometimes uncertain process.

I first registered with Xiphias back in January 2020, right before the COVID lockdowns. Despite the long timeline, the team always kept me in the loop, never letting me feel forgotten. From the very beginning, Simran and Deepa handled my initial process with care and professionalism, patiently guiding me through every step.

In December 2023, I received my Notification of Interest (NoI) from Ontario PNP, and by March 2024, I had the nomination request. The confirmation letter arrived in September, followed by my Invitation to Apply (ITA) in October 2024 — and during this crucial phase, I was lucky to have Wasifa (a special shoutout!) and Akhil assisting me. They were not just helpful, but truly proactive and reassuring, always ready with answers and solutions when things got a little overwhelming.

Even when our baby was born in December 2024, and we needed to add her as a dependent to the application, the Xiphias team handled it with such ease. Finally, after all the hurdles, we got our passport submission request by June, 2025.

A special thank you to Varun Sir, the Managing Director, who personally took the time to clear several of my doubts and was involved whenever I needed clarity or reassurance. His leadership and involvement made a big difference in my confidence throughout the journey.

If there’s one thing I’ve learned — it’s that immigration is not a fast process, and patience is everything. You can’t rush it. But having the right team beside you makes all the difference. I’m truly grateful to Xiphias Immigration Pvt. Ltd. and would highly recommend them to anyone looking to start their immigration journey.

I recently had the pleasure of working with Xiphias to obtain my Canadian Permanent Residency, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. The entire team was professional, knowledgeable, and always available to address my concerns. Soumya and Anjana were incredibly helpful during the early stages of my journey, especially before I received my Invitation to Apply (ITA). Their guidance and support were invaluable.

After receiving my ITA, Wasifa took charge of my file, and she was equally exceptional. Her expertise and dedication made the rest of the process much smoother and more manageable. I am truly grateful to all three of them for their assistance.

Their collective dedication to providing personalized attention and ensuring that all details were handled with care truly set them apart. Thanks to their efforts, I am now a proud Canadian Permanent Resident. I highly recommend Xiphias to anyone seeking immigration assistance. Their services are top-notch, and they genuinely care about their clients' success.

I was a client of Xiphias using their service for Canada immigration under Federal Skilled Worker programme. After my 2-month long research and contact with several immigration consultancies, I landed up with Xiphias after finding positive customer feedback and their unique registration and certification status. I walked into their Bengaluru office in October 2018 wherein I was immediately given an appointment with Ms Chandrakala from the sales team. She was very courteous and walked me through every detail of the process and cleared my doubts happily.




One of the main concerns we will have while approaching consultants is trusting them with the hefty fees they charge -- but after almost 9 months of my relationship with them, I can assure you that you are in perfectly safe and faithful hands if you are going to choose Xiphias as your immigration consultant though the consultant fee charged is definitely overpriced.




Getting into the Express Entry process for Canada, it is not compulsory that you hire a consultant to get through the process. All information is clearly provided on the Canada government website and we can proceed on our own, given that we are very well-planned, organized and systematic without any other distraction. This is where Xiphias comes in -- they will take up the responsibility to plan and organize the application schedule and push us at every step if we are getting distracted with our job or day-to-day activities.




It starts with WES Educational Credential Assessment (ECA), which almost consumed about 2 months for me. In the meantime, I made use of the very helpful IELTS preparation online tool provided by Xiphias and obtained the desired score in IELTS. An Express Entry profile was created in the third week of December 2018 and to my good fortune, I received an Invitation to Apply in the very next draw on January 10, 2019 when the cut-off CRS score was 449. 




I had some confusions during this stage as I was not allowed to access my Express Entry profile and I had to depend on my coordinators for every step but then following an email of mine, I received a Skype call from Mr Payman Mehrani, the CEO himself, who patiently explained and clarified all my concerns. It was very kind of him to do that, wherein he explained that as the consultancy is registered with Govt. of Canada's CIC, they have a separate consultant account and they process all their clients' profiles through this single account. Thus, it would not be possible to provide separate access to each client's profile. 




My account was handed over to the ITA Team (Ms Shwetlina) at Xiphias after this. This stage required me to obtain Police and medical clearance along with settlement fund documents. As Xiphias had instructed me to obtain my work experience and all educational documents earlier, a lot of time was saved and gave me ample time to proceed with notarizing all the documents and then go on to scanning and uploading the same. After thorough review, feedback and corrections, Xiphias submitted my final application three weeks before my PR application deadline after receiving ITA (in February).




I faced minor hiccups at this stage too because of staff shortage at Xiphias office and some technical reasons but then Xiphias promptly resolved all issues professionally and responsibly. What I would like to stress is that the team takes every step to ensure that there are no errors resulting from misinterpretations or overlooking of instructions in the documents submitted and revert to us at every stage to make corrections so that the final submission is free of all errors and the processing goes smooth.




I received my biometrics request in April 2019 and final passport request in July 2019. The passport with the visa along with COPR was returned to me by the fourth week of July 2019. I have deep gratitude towards Mr Payman, my coordinators and the whole team at Xiphias who worked efficiently and cordially to complete the application. I would like to thank each and every one of them and recommend Xiphias to all the future immigration aspirants while reminding that the service may not exactly be value for money considering the consultant fee charged and the option for individuals to apply on their own.

He was more convinced than I was about my profile and the chances of it going through. It took me a little over two months to procure all the necessary documents, IELTS (CLB9),WES Evaluation etc. The second stage of this journey was handled very well by Ms. Ranjitha. She helped me with the minutest of details and guided with each and every document that was essential for the Express Entry pool. On December 19,2017 my Express Entry profile was created and on December 21,2017 I received the ITA at CRS 450. Ms. Kavya Shetty was constantly by my side during the third phase of this journey. Under her able guidance I procured and submitted all the necessary documents like PCC India, PCC UK, Medical. POF, Reference Letters etc. And  finally, on February 19, 2018, began the longest lag of my journey. I received AOR on the said date and in quick succession UCI was given and I passed medical too. I always presumed that since I am under 30, single and have no dependants my PPR will come earlier than usual but boy! was I wrong?! Time flew from February to June but I didn't hear anything from immigration office and I would have lost the patience way sooner had Mr. Payman Mehrani not been there to keep my nerves intact by his long explanatory emails and ever so prompt replies. It was on July 11,2018 when we got to know that my application was actually approved on June 26, 2018 but due to a technical glitch it didn't reach my representative, Mr. Mehrani. He duly raised a request to resent the passport request letter and followed up the request more diligently than I would actually have. It was just yesterday when I decided to call Mr. Mehrani for the very first time because this entire waiting game had left me quite frustrated. I somehow miscalculated the time difference and woke him up from his slumber, yet, he spent the next one hour explaining everything in great detail by citing relevant example from his years of experience. I did disturb his sleep but I somehow drifted to a relatively peaceful sleep last night after speaking to Mr. Mehrani and this morning welcomed me with a pleasant surprise when I saw an email notification that started with "congratulations!" that was it... the much awaited email had finally arrived with a request to submit my passport at the nearest VFS Global for visa stamping. I am happy to announce that I am now just one step away from my destination.
A heartfelt thank you goes to team Xiphias and especially to, Nibu, Ranjitha, Kavya, Payman and Varun (who congratulates me after crossing every important stage). This wouldn't have possible without your relentless efforts. Last, but definitely never the least, I would like to take this opportunity to thank my friend YSg for helping me trust Xiphias for always giving me the courage to pursue this dream.

Our experience with XIPHIAS is very bad.
We have started our process on end of 2016. We submitted all the documents for verification on Feb 2017. They took 4 months to review the documents. We waited patiently and asked them about other documents that need to be submitted for Skill assessment, but they said nothing. On May 2017 after verifying the documents, they asked us to give the experience documents certified by a notary. Again we managed to give the same within 2 weeks.
After that they again wasted one more month and applied for skill assessment only on July. To make it fast we given additional money to apply the skill assessment in fast-track. We got our skill assessment done within one month (on Aug 2017). They applied for EOI on Aug 2017(may be because of the pressure from our side) and on Oct 10 they informed us that EOI has come. We were so happy that now only remaining task is applying PR. We have given all the remaining documents within no time.
Really the EOI came on Sep 20th and they didn’t informed the same to us on time. There on 60 days time to apply for PR. We thought the last date to apply in DEC 9 2017, but actually the last date was NOV 19 2017. We realized this only on Nov 02. After that they asked for Indian PCC. We managed to get PCC also 1 week prior to Nov 19th. We were too much worried and asked them to submit the PR application before last date. But every day they gave some excuses and dragged till last date.
We didn’t get any confirmation on Nov 19th about the application submit ion. When we enquired they told the system crashed and we raised a complaint to DIBP. Today in JAN 25 2018, already more than 2 months after the last date for submitting PR. Still now they are enquiring to DIBP. Still our application is incomplete and they are talking to DIBP. No idea what will be outcome, because of their carelessness.
So my advice to people who are looking for PR in Australia, try some other agency or do it yourself. Please don’t go with XIPHIAS. Only because of them we lost our money, time and effort. We can get PR on time, if we don’t go with these people.
